error_signature: unexpected navigation on close button click
title: Unexpected navigation when closing side menu
symptom: Clicking the close button on the side menu unexpectedly navigates back to the home page instead of just closing the menu.
not_this_if: Close button is functioning correctly on all pages
root_cause: The unexpected navigation occurs because there is a link set up on the parent div of the side menu. This link triggers a navigation action when the close button is clicked, instead of just closing the menu.
fix_steps: Inspect the parent div of the side menu
Remove or disable the link on the parent div
Test the close button functionality again
agent_instruction: Check the parent div of the side menu for any links and remove them to prevent navigation.
